items.name: autokernel
items.description: Autoresearch for GPU kernels. Give it any PyTorch model, go to sleep, wake up to optimized Triton kernels.

items.description: Python tool for studying proxy chaining, HTTP traffic analysis, Tor circuit rotation, and bot detection evasion techniques.

items.name: pxlkit
items.description: Open-source retro React UI kit & pixel art icon library. Includes 40+ React components, 200+ hand-crafted SVG pixel icons (static & animated), and a visual builder. Built with TypeScript & Next.js.

items.name: reddit-mcp-server
items.description: 🔗 A zero-config Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for Reddit — search posts, browse subreddits, scrape user activity, and get structured data via any MCP-compatible AI client. No API keys or authentication needed.

items.name: figsor
items.description: Figsor is an MCP server that bridges [Cursor AI](https://cursor.sh) to [Figma](https://www.figma.com), enabling chat-driven design creation and editing — directly on your Figma canvas.

items.name: RogueGen
items.description: RogueGen — 通过一句 Prompt 生成可玩的 Roguelike（肉鸽）游戏。

items.name: llm-down
items.description: llm-down is an LLM availability probe tool for OpenAI-compatible APIs, designed for model health checks, gateway validation, scheduled monitoring, and result archiving.

items.name: fireonce-sdk
items.description: Official TypeScript SDK for the FireOnce guaranteed-execution job scheduling platform

items.description: Multi-perspective AI code review bot for GitHub Actions

items.name: ghostty-workspace
items.description: YAML-driven tab layout manager for Ghostty terminal (macOS). Save and restore multi-tab workspaces with splits, titles, and startup commands.

items.name: assemble

items.name: utsm_sim
items.description: Containerised ROS2 Humble environment for development of the UTS Motorsports Autonomous software stack. Includes a ROS Gym bridge, RViz visualization, and a development workspace for implementing and testing nodes in a reproducible Docker environment.
